hero.title: Plan and control your work at a glance
hero.p: plan-track.pro gives you team workload visibility and delivery control without chaos. Plan jobs with individual skills in mind — the system suggests the optimal schedule so you don’t lose a minute.

features.title: 180-day timeline
features.desc: 90 days ahead and 90 days of history. Individual working schedules per assignee.

features.title: Worker / center loads
features.desc: The system proposes a plan to meet the deadline as fast as possible considering current workload.

features.title: Flexible settings
features.desc: Task interruptibility, per-operation duration, and per-assignee skills taken into account.

features.title: Statuses & dates
features.desc: Each item has an ID, and its production status is tracked in the system.

features.title: KPI & reports
features.desc: Lead-time summaries, assignee performance, defects, throughput.

features.title: Quality & rework control
features.desc: Built-in quality checks and actions to resolve defects.

benefitsTitle: Tangible results in the first month
benefits: Deadline control: risks are visible immediately

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: 30 days free. Then a flat price per team. 20% off for every additional team.

standard.sub: per month for the first team

consult.title: Online onboarding consultation
consult.p: We’ll help you tune planning to your process: calendars, employees and their skills; we’ll show how to create tech cards, plan and track. Leave a request — we’ll contact you to schedule a time.

labels.name: Your name *
labels.agree: I agree to the processing of my personal data to be contacted about this request *

consult.errorAlert: Please provide your name, email, and check the consent box.
consult.successMsg: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We’ll contact you shortly.

items.a: Yes. Operations can be assigned to external production centers with contractual dates.

items.q: How do you handle different timezones?
items.a: The team works in a single project timezone; schedules are built relative to it.
They register and open their personal dashboard. The dispatcher sets a role; tasks appear in the mobile dashboard.

items.q: How do people see status changes?
items.a: After a status changes, others see the update within a minute.

items.q: How is data separated between teams?
items.a: Data is isolated per team: one team can’t see another team’s data.

items.q: Is there a quality controller role?
items.a: Yes. A dedicated controller with a QA UI to mark results/defects. The feature can be disabled.

items.q: Can I migrate to/from other systems?
items.a: Yes. We have a gateway for importing/exporting tech cards.
We don’t collect personal data except the email for account recovery.

cta.title: Ready to bring order to planning?
cta.p: Onboard your team — you can cancel or change the plan anytime.
